productDisplayName: Skechers Men Reliance Silver Sports Shoes
description: Stylish and uber cool, these Cortex-Reliance shoes from the Tone-ups colletion of skechers add an extra bounce to your step. With a great mesh-synthetic leather combination in attractive colors, these shoes are designed to activate your muscles, enhance maneuverability for a natural gait, and optimize support, flexibility and cushioning. Look super stylish in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for durability and style Synthetic overlays for reinforcement and added style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Sofly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for improved ventilation Brand tab on tongue and brand logo embedded on the side Midsole Progressive suspension midsole - a high-durometer cradle that disperses your weight and offers a stabilizing platform for high intensity activities Kinectic core midsole - a low-durometer layer that amplifies roll effect, creating a natural instability that intensifies muscle activity Outsole High density rubber outsole that has flex grooves for increased flexibilty Black lugs on the periphery of the forefoot and heel for extra traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
